title: British Columbia Indigenous Projects Summit
content:
## British Columbia Indigenous Projects Summit
Join prominent leaders from Indigenous groups, industry, and finance alongside McCarthy Tétrault’s Indigenous and Project Finance Groups for a discussion on Indigenous leadership, partnerships and participation in projects, British Columbia opportunities, and the vital role that Indigenous communities will play in future project development. This afternoon session will feature a series of panels and speakers to explore:
- The implications of the recent BC Hydro clean power call and strategies for advancing projects to a financeable stage Sashen Guneratna , Managing Director, Investments, Canada Infrastructure Bank Julia Mancinelli , Senior Director – Environment, Innergex Jamie Houssian , Principal, Elemental Energy Mark Podlasly , Executive, First Nations Major Projects Coalition, Board Director at Hydro One and CIBC, and Chief Sustainability Officer, Nlaka’pamux Nation
- Sashen Guneratna , Managing Director, Investments, Canada Infrastructure Bank
- Julia Mancinelli , Senior Director – Environment, Innergex
- Jamie Houssian , Principal, Elemental Energy
- Mark Podlasly , Executive, First Nations Major Projects Coalition, Board Director at Hydro One and CIBC, and Chief Sustainability Officer, Nlaka’pamux Nation
- Financing Indigenous Projects Fred Di Blasio , CEO, Longhouse Capital Kody Penner , Vice President Corporate Development, Nations Royalty Stephanie Aldersley , Director, Indigenous Projects, Canada Infrastructure Bank
- Fred Di Blasio , CEO, Longhouse Capital
- Kody Penner , Vice President Corporate Development, Nations Royalty
- Stephanie Aldersley , Director, Indigenous Projects, Canada Infrastructure Bank
We invite you to join us to engage with experts as they share perspectives on these critical topics followed by a networking reception.
For questions about this event, please contact clientevents@mccarthy.ca . This program qualifies for up to 2 hours of CPD credit under the mandatory education regimes in British Columbia and Ontario.
- Law Society of Ontario – Substantive
- Law Society of British Columbia – Substantive
